prerequisites: A Snapchat Business account with access to Snap Business Manager, and Organization Admin status (required to register an OAuth app under the Business Details section).

An active advertising organization and at least one ad account in Snap Business Manager whose data you want to pull. The organization IDs (organization_ids) and ad account IDs (ad_account_ids) are optional config fields used to scope which entities are synced.
A registered OAuth 2.0 app that grants you a client_id and client_secret, plus a refresh_token obtained by completing the OAuth authorization code flow with the snapchat-marketing-api scope.
Optional reporting parameters you may wish to set: start_date and end_date for the report window, action_report_time, swipe_up_attribution_window, and view_attribution_window.

authMethods.name: OAuth 2.0 (authorization code flow with refresh token)
authMethods.summary: The Snapchat Marketing API authenticates requests with OAuth 2.0 access tokens. The connector uses the three secret fields client_id, client_secret, and refresh_token: the connector exchanges the long-lived refresh_token (with grant_type=refresh_token) at the token endpoint to mint short-lived access tokens, since access tokens are valid for only 3600 seconds (60 minutes). You obtain the refresh_token by completing the OAuth authorization code flow once against the snapchat-marketing-api scope.

setupSteps.title: Register an OAuth app in Snap Business Manager
setupSteps.body: Sign in to Snap Business Manager as an Organization Admin and open the Business Details section. Agree to the Snap Developer Terms and Snap Business Tools Terms, then create an OAuth app by providing an app name and a redirect URI (the location users are returned to after authorizing). On creation you receive a client_id and a client_secret. The client_secret is shown only once, so store it securely.

setupSteps.title: Authorize and obtain a refresh token
setupSteps.body: Run the OAuth 2.0 authorization code flow. Direct a user with access to your ad organization to https://accounts.snapchat.com/login/oauth2/authorize with your client_id, the registered redirect_uri, response_type=code, and scope=snapchat-marketing-api. After the user authorizes, capture the returned authorization code and exchange it via POST to https://accounts.snapchat.com/login/oauth2/access_token (with your client_id, client_secret, and the same redirect_uri) to receive an access token and a refresh_token. Keep the refresh_token: the connector uses it to mint fresh access tokens automatically.

setupSteps.title: Supply credentials to the connector
setupSteps.body: Provide the required secret fields client_id, client_secret, and refresh_token. The connector will refresh access tokens against the token endpoint as needed.

setupSteps.title: Scope and configure the sync (optional)
setupSteps.body: Optionally set organization_ids and ad_account_ids to limit which organizations and ad accounts are synced. Set start_date and end_date to bound the reporting window, and tune action_report_time, swipe_up_attribution_window, and view_attribution_window to control how conversions and attribution are reported.
